title: In s 5, Parliament chose not to condition immunity by reference to such language

evidence.clean_text: 29. In s 5, Parliament chose not to condition immunity by reference to such language, and so reading it in to the section, as the Defendants would have me do, would exceed the proper bounds of statutory construction. In other words, the Defendant’s limitation on s 5 to purely private acts would overturn the plain meaning of s 5.
